titleStmt.title: SII 20.119: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 119. (B.K. No. 69 of 1936-37.) MALGHĀṆ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab fixed in the front wall of Mallikārjuna temple.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 11, Vibhava, Pushya, śu. 13 Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1148, December 25. The weekday was, however, Saturday.

The inscription records a gift of land, house-site, and income from taxes for worship and offerings in the temple of Mādhavēśvara, built by Mādhava-Ghaisāsa a the agrahāra Mallagāṇa, situated in Kummasi-30, a kampaṇa included in Tarddavāḍi1000 province, by the ūroḍeya Gaṅgeya-Mahādēva-Bhaṭṭōpādhyāya and the prabhus and Mahājanas of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnata daṁṣṭrāgraviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu pratāpacakravartti ja
gadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkatā raṁbaraṁ salutta
mire kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷ sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiralu ©
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁ
pannaru sakalajagatprathitanirmmaḷabhāradvājakulōtpaṁnnaru pratidinakriyamāṇapaṁ
camahāyajñapavitrīkritakāyaru rugvēdādhyayanapravīṇyaprasādita
śrōtriyanikāyaru Uttīrṇnasamastasmritipurāṇaratnākararu sarvvakratusōma
yājigaḷu haracaraṇasarōjamadhukararu nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīma
dūrūḍeyaru gaṁgeyamahādēvabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru © pramukha samastaprabhumukhya Aśē
ṣamahājanaṁgaḷu © Āsti bhagavataḥ kamaḷayōnērmanasaḥ putrō mahariśirvasiṣṭō nā
ma tasya gōtrassakaḷajagatprathitayatiṣuddhamatiruttarasakaḷaguṇasaṁpaṁnō vā
madēvabhaṭṭō nāmā bhavatu tasya patnī kaṁcikabbe nāmā bhavatu tayōssarvva
guṇasaṁpaṁnō guṁḍadēvabhaṭṭanāmā yajurvvēdavidāmagraṇīḥ putrōbhava
tu tasya patnī kulaśīlādiguṇaikanurūdārakaṁmā nāma tayōrddhārmmika
yōḥ puṇyakritōstanūjaḥ sudhārmmikō mādhavasarmānāma rugvēdavēdī dvi
javaryyamadhyē saṁpūjyatē yō ghaṭisāsināmaḥ tasyā bhavatu dharmmapatnī
manōjñe pōciyakkanāmnī ca guṇaissamruddhō sarvvaguṇasaṁpannapuṇyaka
rmma mādhavaghaisāsaru śrīmatardḍavāḍisāsirada baḷiya kaṁpaṇa kuṁmasi mū
vattaṟoḷagaṇa śrīmatsarvvanamasyadagrahāraṁ mallagāṇadalu śivaliṁgavaṁ pratiṣṭeya
māḍalu Ā prabhugaḷuṁ mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ nōḍi prasaṁnarāgi śrīmatu
pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvavarṣada 11 neya vibhavasaṁvatsarada puśya suddha 13
brihavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyaṁdu śrīmādhavēsvaradēvargge biṭṭa bhūmi beṭṭa
da bhagavatiyiṁ paḍuvalu māṇikēsvarada kōla mattaru 20 Ā dēvara pūThese five letters Ā dēvara pū have been erased.
Ā dēvara pūjeya puḻpakkeṁdu siṁdigeya baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuvalu haḷḷadiṁ teṁkalu biṭṭa mā
ṇikēsvarada kōlalu hūdōṭaṁ mattaru 1 hiriya dēvara nivēśanadiṁ paḍuvalu hattu kayya
gala yippattaydu kayya nīḷada maneya nivēśana 1 guṁḍedēvabhaṭṭayyaṁgaḷa baṇabe
yiṁda mūḍalu hadināṟu kayyagala yippattu kayya nīḷada baṇabeya nivēśana 1
keyigaṁ manegaṁ baṇaṁbegaṁ tōṁṭakkaṁ prativariṣakkaṁ kaṭuṁbaṇavāgi kiṟi
ya dīpāvaḷiyalu tiṟuva Āruvaṇaṁ gadyāṇa 1 dharaṇa 1 dēvaraṁgabhōga soḍaru nivēdyakke ne
llu baḷḷa 1 caitrapavitrake mattaru 14 pūjārige mattaru 6 Antu mattaru 20 Ī dharmmamaṁ
Ūruṁ prabhugaḷuṁ(gaḷuṁ) mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ kādūḍuvaru Ī dharmmamaṁnāvanōrvva naḷidavaṁ vāraṇā
siyaluṁ kurukṣētradaluṁ kavileyuṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda dōṣamakku Ī dharmma
manāmū rvvaṁ pratipālisidavarige vāraṇāsiyalu sāsirakavileyaṁ Uttamarappa brāRead nāvanōrvvam.
hmaṇarige dānaṁgoṭṭa puṇyamakku . svaṁ dātuṁ sumahacchakyaṁ duḥkhamanyasya pālanaṁ
dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
bahubhiḥrvvasudhā dattāṁ rājabhiḥ ssagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi stasya
stasya tadā phalaṁ © .
Digital edition of SII 20.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
